get 0 4
set 0x40007000 0x0

get 0x4000701c 1

set 0x40007008 0x55555555

get 0x7F00 4
set 0x40007000 0x0

erase main flash
set 0x40007014 0x100
set 0x4000701c 0xFFFFFFFF
set 0x40007004 0x0
set 0x40007000 0x464c4f05

erase info
set 0x40007014 0x100
set 0x4000701c 0xFFFFFFFF

erase chip
set 0x40007014 0x100

set 0x40007004 0x0

get flash
set 0x40007014 0x100
set 0x4000701c 0xFFFFFFFF

get 0x40007008 1
